tasks.subject: Task 1: Add _with_retry helper + constants + 2 unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Module-level `_with_retry` async helper wraps Redis calls with 2-attempt retry (50ms backoff) on transient errors. Adds 4 module constants. 2 unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py -v` → 2 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["4 module constants defined","_with_retry retries on transient errors only","exhausts after 3 attempts and re-raises","2 unit tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Reorder start_crawl + Retry-After + apply _with_retry + 3 integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply Spec § 3.1 reorder — local check FIRST, global READ probe SECOND, lock+INCR+race backstop THIRD. Retry-After headers. Wrap 4 load-bearing ops in _with_retry. 3 integration tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py:340-432`
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py -v` → 5 passed

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py","apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_start_crawl_capacity.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["local check before any Redis op","global READ probe before mutating ops","Retry-After header on both 503s","_with_retry on all 4 load-bearing ops","race backstop preserved","3 new integration tests + 2 existing helper tests all green"]}
```
